title: Bloempot steenDIA 40XH31CM Black
description: Introducing our Flowerpot Stone A stylish and practical choice for displaying your favorite plants. This flowerpot features a durable plastic construction that resembles the look of stone, adding a touch of elegance to any space. Let's explore its key features: Key Features: Stone-Like Design: The Flowerpot Stone is designed to mimic the appearance of natural stone, adding a touch of sophistication to your plants. The black color enhances its sleek and modern look, making it a versatile choice for various indoor and outdoor settings. Spacious Dimensions: With a height of 31 cm and a diameter of 40 cm, this flowerpot offers ample space for your plants to grow and thrive. The wide opening provides enough room for planting and allows proper airflow for the roots. Durable and Lightweight: Made from high-quality plastic, this flowerpot offers the perfect balance of durability and lightweight design. It is resistant to weather conditions, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. You can easily move and rearrange your plants without any hassle. Versatile Usage: The Flowerpot Stone is suitable for a wide variety of plants, including flowers, herbs, succulents, and more. Its neutral black color complements any plant and seamlessly blends with different decor styles, whether you place it in your living room, patio, balcony, or garden. Product Specifications: Material: Plastic Height: 31 cm Width: 40 cm Length: 40 cm Diameter: 40 cm Color: Black Enhance the beauty of your plants with our Flowerpot Stone. Its stone-like design, spacious dimensions, and durable construction make it a reliable choice for showcasing your greenery. Whether you're an avid gardener or simply love having plants in your living space, this flowerpot is sure to add a touch of elegance and style.
